prompt: View all delayed shipments from 'Superior Materials' and 'Reliable Suppliers Co', including order details, delivery performance, and costs.

app_definition.app_description: This dashboard displays all delayed shipments from Superior Materials and Reliable Suppliers Co, including order details, delivery performance, and costs.

components.title: Delayed Shipments from Superior Materials and Reliable Suppliers Co
components.sql_query:
SELECT order_id, order_date, supplier, region, product, category, quantity, unit_cost, total_cost, defect_rate, delivery_days, on_time_delivery, shipping_mode, shipping_cost, warehouse_cost
FROM supply_chain
WHERE supplier IN ('Superior Materials', 'Reliable Suppliers Co') AND on_time_delivery = 0

components.title: Delayed Shipments from Superior Materials and Reliable Suppliers Co
components.explanation: Delayed Shipments from Superior Materials and Reliable Suppliers Co: Shows 145 rows across 15 columns
